description:
Local-first desktop PDF studio

LocalPDF Studio is a local-first desktop PDF viewer and utility suite built with Tauri.
Features include PDF viewing, merging, splitting, encryption, OCR (via Tesseract),
page editing (reorder/delete/rotate/insert), watermarking, metadata editing,
form filling, searchable PDF generation, and side-by-side comparison.
All processing is performed locally — no cloud uploads.
